Description

This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.

This package contains classes for implementing rules.

This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.

  • Uses of AuxiliaryContract in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang with type parameters of type AuxiliaryContract
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Combinator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
    This class is used to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
    protected static class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
    This class contains a builder method for AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpls (AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator.create()).
    class 
    FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
    This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for an AuxiliaryContract.
    Subinterfaces of AuxiliaryContract in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BlockContract
    A block contract.
    interface 
    LoopContract
    A contract for a block that begins with a loop.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
    Abstract base class for all default implementations of the sub-interfaces of AuxiliaryContract.
    final class 
    BlockContractImpl
    Default implementation of BlockContract.
